'''''Whirlwind''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]<ref name="Darksaber" /> from which [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Blitzer Harrsk]] led [[Arrowhead Command]] until the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="TIW" /> In the years following the death of [[Palpatine/Legends#Palpatine_reborn_.284_ABY.E2.80.9311_ABY.29|Palpatine's clones]], it was one of twelve Imperial Star Destroyers under Harrsk's control as Supreme [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]].<ref name="Darksaber" />

During the Galactic Empire's [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|war]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], the ''Whirlwind'' was Admiral Harrsk's [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] within the [[Arrowhead]], the intersection of [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic regions]] [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] and the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Arrowhead Command was attached to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy's]] [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]] at the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], where the ''Whirlwind'' sustained damage, causing an internal explosion that [[Death/Legends|killed]] the ship's [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Bolla Thoath]] and drove shrapnel through Harrsk's face and brain. Though conceived as a trap for the Alliance, the Rebels were victorious at Endor, driving the Imperial forces to withdraw. Though Harrsk survived and initially complied with the retreat, he had been driven insane by his injuries and split with the Empire for the galaxy's treacherous [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] region, establishing the rogue faction [[Zero Command]].<ref name="TIW" />

[[12 ABY/Legends|Eight years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Harrsk's faction was attacked by a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] under the command of rival [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]]—the battle cost Harrsk his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the heavily modified [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Shockwave (Imperial-class)|''Shockwave'']].<ref name="Darksaber" />

Thirsty for revenge, Harrsk took command of his fleet from aboard the ''Whirlwind''—with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] assisting from aboard the Star Destroyer [[Firestorm (Imperial-class)|''Firestorm'']]—and launched a retaliatory strike against Teradoc. While in the midst of the raid, Daala—angry over the chaotic state of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the loss of her loyal second-in-command, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Kratas]]—disabled the ''Whirlwind'' with a volley of [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] fire, then opened a [[Comm unit/Legends|comm]] channel to both Harrsk's and Teradoc's forces requesting an end to in-fighting, and the selection of a [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|commander]] to lead the remaining Imperial forces against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]; if not such demands were met, she would self-destruct the ''Firestorm'', taking with her ''Whirlwind'' and all surrounding vessels.<ref name="Darksaber" />

[[File:Jediacademi_01_20.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The ''Whirlwind'' was absorbed into Daala and Pellaeon's United Warlord Fleets.]]
Following the ''negotiations'' at [[Tsoss Beacon/Legends|Tsoss Beacon]] and the reunification of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] warlords, ''Whirlwind'' fell into the hands of the [[United Warlord Fleets|united fleet]] under Daala and then-[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]. It would serve as part of a force of forty-five Star Destroyers under Pellaeon's command, and part of his personal armada of thirteen.<ref name="Darksaber" />
